fields.name: defaultItemTtl
fields.description: The default ttl for the workspaces items, in seconds. If not set, the default will be set by server configuration (currently 1 year)

fields.name: labels
fields.description: A list of user defined labels or tags

fields.name: name
fields.description: The name of the workspace, must be seen as a human readable technique id. Can not be formatted like an id. Must be unique in the platform. Auto-generated if not provided at the creation of the workspace.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human readable workspace title for convenience

fields.name: userId
fields.description: The id of the user who own the workspace
